name: Almarai Company
summary: Almarai Company, together with its subsidiaries, operates as an integrated consumer food and beverage company in Saudi Arabia, Egypt, Jordan, and rest of Gulf Cooperation Council countries. The company operates through Dairy and Juice, Bakery, Poultry, and Other Activities segments. It offers dairy, fruit juice, and related food products under the Almarai, Joosy Life, Beyti, and Teeba brand names; bakery products under the L'usine and 7 Days brand names; and poultry products under the Alyoum and AlBashayer brand names. The company also engages in the arable and horticulture activities; and provision of infant nutrition products under the Nuralac and Evolac brand names. Almarai Company was founded in 1977 and is headquartered in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia.
